items.title: Using Local Coding Agents
items.core_innovation: Practical guide to open-weight models in local coding harnesses
items.significance: Viable free/private alternative to Claude Code/Codex subscriptions

items.title: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command
items.core_innovation: One-command vLLM deployment via HF Jobs infrastructure
items.significance: Lowers barrier to serving LLMs at scale for practitioners

items.title: Accelerating Transformers Fine-Tuning with NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel
items.core_innovation: NeMo AutoModel speeds up HF Transformers fine-tuning
items.significance: Reduces cost/time for custom model fine-tuning workflows

items.title: Featuring Every Eval Ever Results on Hugging Face Model Pages
items.core_innovation: Aggregated community eval results surfaced on model pages
items.significance: Improves model selection transparency for practitioners

items.title: RaBitQCache: Rotated Binary Quantization for KVCache in Long Context LLM Inference
items.core_innovation: Binary-INT4 rotated quantization for sparse attention KV cache
items.significance: Cuts long-context inference memory/compute vs fixed top-k methods

items.title: TraceLab: Characterizing Coding Agent Workloads for LLM Serving
items.core_innovation: Real-world trace dataset of 4,300 coding-agent sessions
items.significance: Fills gap in serving-system benchmarks for agentic workloads

items.title: ComplianceGate: Classifier-Gated Multi-Tier LLM Routing for Inference in Regulated Industries
items.core_innovation: PII-aware classifier gating routes queries across jurisdictional tiers
items.significance: Addresses compliance+cost tradeoff for regulated LLM deployment

items.title: Learning from Failure: Inference-Time Self-Improvement for Computer-Use Agents
items.core_innovation: Self-improvement from failed trajectories at inference time
items.significance: Reduces need for costly synthetic success-only training loops

items.title: MOPD: Multi-Teacher On-Policy Distillation for Capability Integration in LLM Post-Training
items.core_innovation: On-policy distillation merges multiple domain-RL teacher capabilities
items.significance: Solves capability-integration bottleneck better than Mix-RL

items.title: PS-PPO: Prefix-Sampling PPO for Critic-Free RLHF
items.core_innovation: Prefix-level updates avoid full-trajectory cost in critic-free RLHF
items.significance: Cuts optimization cost for long reasoning-trace RLHF training

items.title: The Joint Effect of Quantization and Sampling Temperature on LLM Safety Alignment
items.core_innovation: Factorial study of quantization x temperature effects on safety
items.significance: Shows deployment knobs can interact to erode safety guarantees

items.title: When Does Online Imitation Learning Help in LLM Post-Training?
items.core_innovation: Realizability, not error accumulation, explains online IL gains
items.significance: Reframes when on-policy distillation beats offline SFT

items.title: Bridging the Gap Between Latent and Explicit Reasoning with Looped Transformers
items.core_innovation: Recurrent-depth looped transformers close latent-CoT scaling gap
items.significance: Could enable efficient latent reasoning beyond 1B params
